3114860.name: Barrok
3114860.description:
Dive into a fast race.

An arcade racing game in which you try to be first by beating other competitors. Reflexes are everything in this game, pass the sharp bends and race for first place.

Even though it is basically an ordinary racing game, it has a map design and artificial intelligence bots that will entertain you a lot.

Features

  • An impressive driving experience
  • Race with artificial intelligence bots
  • Dynamic physics
  • Various camera angles
